discount_10pct.name: Descuento 10%
discount_10pct.description: Descuento del 10% en el cargo mensual durante 3 meses
discount_10pct.rationale: 10% discount for 3 months balances retention incentive vs revenue loss. The 3-month window matches typical churn decision cycles.

personal_call.name: Llamada personalizada
personal_call.description: Llamada de retención por un agente especializado de 15 min
personal_call.rationale: Personal outreach by trained agents addresses service dissatisfaction — the top churn driver in telco. $15 cost assumes a 15-min call at $60/hr fully-loaded agent cost. Min tenure of 3 months excludes brand-new customers where onboarding issues dominate.

plan_upgrade.name: Upgrade de plan
plan_upgrade.description: Upgrade gratuito de plan por 2 meses (e.g., más canales, mejor internet)
plan_upgrade.rationale: Service upgrades target the highest-risk segment with the strongest retention boost. Min tenure of 6 months ensures the customer has enough history to benefit from an upgrade. Cost of $30 represents estimated COGS for 2 months of upgraded service.

defaults.rationale: monthly_budget: ~1% of estimated monthly revenue. average_customer_lifetime_months=36: telco industry average. discount_rate_annual=0.10: standard WACC approximation for telco companies.

metadata.description: Cost-benefit matrix for churn intervention policies. Each policy defines an intervention with its cost structure, expected retention boost, and eligibility rules.
